## Gate-2 Architecture PR (Required)

### Required Links (must be non-empty)
- Evidence dashboard URL: `https://brunogaosz.github.io/ljwx-deploy/`
- Prior gate PR URL (Gate-1):
- Architecture document URL:
- Decision log URL:

### Strict Checklist (all required)
- [ ] Component boundaries are defined.
- [ ] Data flow and contracts are documented.
- [ ] Security and rollback strategy are documented.
- [ ] Dependency and migration impact assessed.
- [ ] Architecture evidence link is attached.

### Blocking Rule
PR must not merge until every checkbox is checked and required links are filled.
